name: TC-SF-004 — GET /api/v1/fetch/status: apiEndpoint is a valid HTTPS URL
description:
**What this test does:**
Parses the apiEndpoint field and verifies it is a well-formed HTTPS URL.

**Why it matters:** apiEndpoint is the upstream KCB API URL the spr-fetcher will call when the trigger fires. An invalid, HTTP-only, or malformed URL means all trigger calls will fail. HTTPS is required because the request includes a Bearer token — HTTP would expose that token in transit.
descriptionHtml:
What this test does:
Parses the apiEndpoint field and verifies it is a well-formed HTTPS URL.

Why it matters: apiEndpoint is the upstream KCB API URL the spr-fetcher will call when the trigger fires. An invalid, HTTP-only, or malformed URL means all trigger calls will fail. HTTPS is required because the request includes a Bearer token — HTTP would expose that token in transit.
